top_signals.title: Lagarde Sees No Need for More Forceful ECB Response to Iran War
top_signals.summary: The European Central Bank doesn’t need to react more forcefully to the fallout from the Middle East conflict because inflation is set to return to target over the medium term, President Christine Lagarde said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EasyJet rejects £4.7bn takeover bid from Castlelake
top_signals.summary: US private credit group goes public with latest 625p-a-share offer after airline’s board refuses to engage
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: These XRP price charts hint at potential 25% relief rally in July
top_signals.summary: An XRP death cross and liquidation signals align for a possible 25% relief rally in the short term, while one analyst eyes a longer-term rebound toward $8.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transcript of the Governor's pooled broadcast interview given on 18 June 2026
top_signals.summary: Following the publication of the Monetary Policy Summary and minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee meeting

top_signals.title: Bond Traders Plot Impact of Next UK Chancellor With Starmer Out
top_signals.summary: UK bond investors say Chancellor Rachel Reeves is on borrowed time after Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s resignation and are plotting the market impact of her possible replacements.
